text.title: Strategy Analysis — Current State — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the artefact end-to-end.

step.name: scope-as-is
step.action: Decide which slices of current state are in scope.

step.name: interview-owners
step.action: Interview process/system owners; collect evidence per claim.

step.name: document-structured
step.action: Author processes / systems / capabilities / pain-points / constraints rows.

step.name: quantify-pain
step.action: Apply pain rubric (frequency × impact) to every pain point.
